title: cyperus tabularis var. ecklonii
intro: Cyperus tabularis var. ecklonii, also known as the umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparation of Cyperus tabularis var. ecklonii typically involves boiling the roots and rhizomes to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
